TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: nanu' iy musa taygalu' na ungat pqmahun naha' rhzyal, ini' ga musa' smzyay' ga, mutuw naha' skayal krayryax qu sun bnkis maha sinbilan kay' na bnkis qani, iwan kkyalan naha' na maha iyat maku' sinbahan nanak qu nyuw!maku' s'uwah qani maha qu kay' nya' qaniy! iyat ta' balay pqtnaq sqyanux qu buq na qsya' qani. nanu' qu ssawn bbnkis Tayal maha sinbilan kay' bnkis sraral qani? yalaw gi mnaki' kya bay'nux Sbayan kwara' qu kinbkaysan ha, mngaygyut mbhuyaw lqu mqhut naha' qu ki'an naha' la, ru lmnglung kya qu nbkis naha' ka lkmButa' qasa maha〝iyat ta' balay pqtnaq sqyanux qu buq na qsya' qani〞 maha, lruw rasun niya' qu mntsway' nya' lkmYabuh ruw lkMayan musa' gmawzyaw sa 'awsa' msglabang mqyanuh kinbahan naha', ruw ktan naha' kwara' rgyax cyuw maymaw mtpanga' rngu' whci' qu rrhzyal, maymaw mqas balay maha,〝 yani balay musa' sginlabang mqyanux kinbahan ta' la〞maha, ruw yasa qu mwah lga spnqzyu' nya' sa kinbahan nya' maha laqi'! kyalaw simu qutux kay', nyuw ta khmay qani lga, nway simu musa' hmkangi' sa awsa' mamu mslabang mqyanux, maha si simu klahang qbuli' krahu' qani ga, iyat mamu' qtnaq pqawlun qu buq qsya' ta' qani, ru ana ka maqaw uzi ga 'basun mamu' m'zyungay mqyanux, hmswa' ga usa'! usa' hmkangi sa ssbqi' na hbun gaygawng, sbilan maku' mayhuw na qnawal qu blihun na Sbayan qani, gi iyat simu nbah mwah mbzinah mntta' sa quri' na Sbayan qani! halay simu smatu' kya quri' sqabu'! iyat simu nbah mgluw mqyanux, musa' simu mtbuci' ms'rux ngaws na luhung, nanu' ana ga laxiy usa' mbbiq na turu', maha simu aki ta pslabang sa rqyas hwinuk laqi' kinbahan pszyunaw mqyanux ga, ima' mamu' cyux ki'an na ppanga' wakil na tawkan, ru ima' mamu la traka' kklbu' na hupaw ga, qiri' musa' mtqtqutux maqut blihun, kuna kya la cyux mqayat sa tluqiy na yaba' ru yaya', 'nblaq pwazyaw, laxi pinqiri' mqyanux! kuna msrihaw la knatan lubay bubu' na yaya' ga, baha simuw yan ygril na qlcing, laxiy pqiway na pakaw, maha ygril simu na qlcing lga, nanu' qu musa' mamu' psglabang sa rqyas hwinuk laqi' mamu lpiy!〞 yani qu sgisa na bbnkis Tayal aring sraral. Cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Hitaypayan 田野資料
S.PHON: nanuʔ ij mus~ɕa tajɣaluʔ na uŋat pqmaħun naħaʔ rħzjal, iniʔ ɣa mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕmzjajʔ ɣa, mutuw naħaʔ s~ɕkajal krajrjax qu s~ɕun βnkis~ɕ maħa s~ɕinβilan kajʔ na βnkis~ɕ qani, iwan kkjalan naħaʔ na maħa ijat makuʔ s~ɕinβaħan nanak qu njuw!makuʔ s~ɕʔuwaħ qani maħa qu kajʔ njaʔ qanij! ijat taʔ βalaj pqtnaq s~ɕqjanux qu βuq na qs~ɕjaʔ qani. nanuʔ qu s~ɕs~ɕawn ββnkis~ɕ tajal maħa s~ɕinβilan kajʔ βnkis~ɕ s~ɕraral qani? jalaw ɣi mnakiʔ kja βajʔnux s~ɕβajan kwaraʔ qu kinβkajs~ɕan ħa, mŋajɣjut mβħujaw lqu mqħut naħaʔ qu kiʔan naħaʔ la, ru lmŋluŋ kja qu nβkis~ɕ naħaʔ ka lkmβutaʔ qas~ɕa maħa*ijat taʔ βalaj pqtnaq s~ɕqjanux qu βuq na qs~ɕjaʔ qani* maħa, lruw ras~ɕun nijaʔ qu mnts~ɕwajʔ njaʔ lkmjaβuħ ruw lkmajan mus~ɕaʔ ɣmawzjaw s~ɕa ʔaws~ɕaʔ ms~ɕɣlaβaŋ mqjanuħ kinβaħan naħaʔ, ruw ktan naħaʔ kwaraʔ rɣjax ʦ~ʨjuw majmaw mtpaŋaʔ rŋuʔ wħʦ~ʨiʔ qu rrħzjal, majmaw mqas~ɕ βalaj maħa,* jani βalaj mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕɣinlaβaŋ mqjanux kinβaħan taʔ la*maħa, ruw jas~ɕa qu mwaħ lɣa s~ɕpnqzjuʔ njaʔ s~ɕa kinβaħan njaʔ maħa laqiʔ! kjalaw s~ɕimu qutux kajʔ, njuw ta kħmaj qani lɣa, nwaj s~ɕimu mus~ɕaʔ ħmkaŋiʔ s~ɕa aws~ɕaʔ mamu ms~ɕlaβaŋ mqjanux, maħa s~ɕi s~ɕimu klaħaŋ qβuliʔ kraħuʔ qani ɣa, ijat mamuʔ qtnaq pqawlun qu βuq qs~ɕjaʔ taʔ qani, ru ana ka maqaw uzi ɣa ʔβas~ɕun mamuʔ mʔzjuŋaj mqjanux, ħms~ɕwaʔ ɣa us~ɕaʔ! us~ɕaʔ ħmkaŋi s~ɕa s~ɕs~ɕβqiʔ na ħβun ɣajɣawŋ, s~ɕβilan makuʔ majħuw na qnawal qu βliħun na s~ɕβajan qani, ɣi ijat s~ɕimu nβaħ mwaħ mβzinaħ mnttaʔ s~ɕa quriʔ na s~ɕβajan qani! ħalaj s~ɕimu s~ɕmatuʔ kja quriʔ s~ɕqaβuʔ! ijat s~ɕimu nβaħ mɣluw mqjanux, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕimu mtβuʦ~ʨiʔ ms~ɕʔrux ŋaws~ɕ na luħuŋ, nanuʔ ana ɣa laxij us~ɕaʔ mββiq na turuʔ, maħa s~ɕimu aki ta ps~ɕlaβaŋ s~ɕa rqjas~ɕ ħwinuk laqiʔ kinβaħan ps~ɕzjunaw mqjanux ɣa, imaʔ mamuʔ ʦ~ʨjux kiʔan na ppaŋaʔ wakil na tawkan, ru imaʔ mamu la trakaʔ kklβuʔ na ħupaw ɣa, qiriʔ mus~ɕaʔ mtqtqutux maqut βliħun, kuna kja la ʦ~ʨjux mqajat s~ɕa tluqij na jaβaʔ ru jajaʔ, ʔnβlaq pwazjaw, laxi pinqiriʔ mqjanux! kuna ms~ɕriħaw la knatan luβaj βuβuʔ na jajaʔ ɣa, βaħa s~ɕimuw jan jɣril na qlʦ~ʨiŋ, laxij pqiwaj na pakaw, maħa jɣril s~ɕimu na qlʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, nanuʔ qu mus~ɕaʔ mamuʔ ps~ɕɣlaβaŋ s~ɕa rqjas~ɕ ħwinuk laqiʔ mamu lpij!* jani qu s~ɕɣis~ɕa na ββnkis~ɕ tajal ariŋ s~ɕraral. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ħitajpajan ****
S.FORM: nanu' iy musa taygalu' na ungat pqmahun naha' rhzyal, ini' ga musa' smzyay' ga, mutuw naha' skayal krayryax qu sun bnkis maha sinbilan kay' na bnkis qani, iwan kkyalan naha' na maha iyat maku' sinbahan nanak qu nyuw!maku' s'uwah qani maha qu kay' nya' qaniy! iyat ta' balay pqtnaq sqyanux qu buq na qsya' qani. nanu' qu ssawn bbnkis Tayal maha sinbilan kay' bnkis sraral qani? yalaw gi mnaki' kya bay'nux Sbayan kwara' qu kinbkaysan ha, mngaygyut mbhuyaw lqu mqhut naha' qu ki'an naha' la, ru lmnglung kya qu nbkis naha' ka lkmButa' qasa maha〝iyat ta' balay pqtnaq sqyanux qu buq na qsya' qani〞 maha, lruw rasun niya' qu mntsway' nya' lkmYabuh ruw lkMayan musa' gmawzyaw sa 'awsa' msglabang mqyanuh kinbahan naha', ruw ktan naha' kwara' rgyax cyuw maymaw mtpanga' rngu' whci' qu rrhzyal, maymaw mqas balay maha,〝 yani balay musa' sginlabang mqyanux kinbahan ta' la〞maha, ruw yasa qu mwah lga spnqzyu' nya' sa kinbahan nya' maha laqi'! kyalaw simu qutux kay', nyuw ta khmay qani lga, nway simu musa' hmkangi' sa awsa' mamu mslabang mqyanux, maha si simu klahang qbuli' krahu' qani ga, iyat mamu' qtnaq pqawlun qu buq qsya' ta' qani, ru ana ka maqaw uzi ga 'basun mamu' m'zyungay mqyanux, hmswa' ga usa'! usa' hmkangi sa ssbqi' na hbun gaygawng, sbilan maku' mayhuw na qnawal qu blihun na Sbayan qani, gi iyat simu nbah mwah mbzinah mntta' sa quri' na Sbayan qani! halay simu smatu' kya quri' sqabu'! iyat simu nbah mgluw mqyanux, musa' simu mtbuci' ms'rux ngaws na luhung, nanu' ana ga laxiy usa' mbbiq na turu', maha simu aki ta pslabang sa rqyas hwinuk laqi' kinbahan pszyunaw mqyanux ga, ima' mamu' cyux ki'an na ppanga' wakil na tawkan, ru ima' mamu la traka' kklbu' na hupaw ga, qiri' musa' mtqtqutux maqut blihun, kuna kya la cyux mqayat sa tluqiy na yaba' ru yaya', 'nblaq pwazyaw, laxi pinqiri' mqyanux! kuna msrihaw la knatan lubay bubu' na yaya' ga, baha simuw yan ygril na qlcing, laxiy pqiway na pakaw, maha ygril simu na qlcing lga, nanu' qu musa' mamu' psglabang sa rqyas hwinuk laqi' mamu lpiy!〞 yani qu sgisa na bbnkis Tayal aring sraral. Cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Hitaypayan 田野資料
S.PHON: nanuʔ ij mus~ɕa tajɣaluʔ na uŋat pqmaħun naħaʔ rħzjal, iniʔ ɣa mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕmzjajʔ ɣa, mutuw naħaʔ s~ɕkajal krajrjax qu s~ɕun βnkis~ɕ maħa s~ɕinβilan kajʔ na βnkis~ɕ qani, iwan kkjalan naħaʔ na maħa ijat makuʔ s~ɕinβaħan nanak qu njuw!makuʔ s~ɕʔuwaħ qani maħa qu kajʔ njaʔ qanij! ijat taʔ βalaj pqtnaq s~ɕqjanux qu βuq na qs~ɕjaʔ qani. nanuʔ qu s~ɕs~ɕawn ββnkis~ɕ tajal maħa s~ɕinβilan kajʔ βnkis~ɕ s~ɕraral qani? jalaw ɣi mnakiʔ kja βajʔnux s~ɕβajan kwaraʔ qu kinβkajs~ɕan ħa, mŋajɣjut mβħujaw lqu mqħut naħaʔ qu kiʔan naħaʔ la, ru lmŋluŋ kja qu nβkis~ɕ naħaʔ ka lkmβutaʔ qas~ɕa maħa*ijat taʔ βalaj pqtnaq s~ɕqjanux qu βuq na qs~ɕjaʔ qani* maħa, lruw ras~ɕun nijaʔ qu mnts~ɕwajʔ njaʔ lkmjaβuħ ruw lkmajan mus~ɕaʔ ɣmawzjaw s~ɕa ʔaws~ɕaʔ ms~ɕɣlaβaŋ mqjanuħ kinβaħan naħaʔ, ruw ktan naħaʔ kwaraʔ rɣjax ʦ~ʨjuw majmaw mtpaŋaʔ rŋuʔ wħʦ~ʨiʔ qu rrħzjal, majmaw mqas~ɕ βalaj maħa,* jani βalaj mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕɣinlaβaŋ mqjanux kinβaħan taʔ la*maħa, ruw jas~ɕa qu mwaħ lɣa s~ɕpnqzjuʔ njaʔ s~ɕa kinβaħan njaʔ maħa laqiʔ! kjalaw s~ɕimu qutux kajʔ, njuw ta kħmaj qani lɣa, nwaj s~ɕimu mus~ɕaʔ ħmkaŋiʔ s~ɕa aws~ɕaʔ mamu ms~ɕlaβaŋ mqjanux, maħa s~ɕi s~ɕimu klaħaŋ qβuliʔ kraħuʔ qani ɣa, ijat mamuʔ qtnaq pqawlun qu βuq qs~ɕjaʔ taʔ qani, ru ana ka maqaw uzi ɣa ʔβas~ɕun mamuʔ mʔzjuŋaj mqjanux, ħms~ɕwaʔ ɣa us~ɕaʔ! us~ɕaʔ ħmkaŋi s~ɕa s~ɕs~ɕβqiʔ na ħβun ɣajɣawŋ, s~ɕβilan makuʔ majħuw na qnawal qu βliħun na s~ɕβajan qani, ɣi ijat s~ɕimu nβaħ mwaħ mβzinaħ mnttaʔ s~ɕa quriʔ na s~ɕβajan qani! ħalaj s~ɕimu s~ɕmatuʔ kja quriʔ s~ɕqaβuʔ! ijat s~ɕimu nβaħ mɣluw mqjanux, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕimu mtβuʦ~ʨiʔ ms~ɕʔrux ŋaws~ɕ na luħuŋ, nanuʔ ana ɣa laxij us~ɕaʔ mββiq na turuʔ, maħa s~ɕimu aki ta ps~ɕlaβaŋ s~ɕa rqjas~ɕ ħwinuk laqiʔ kinβaħan ps~ɕzjunaw mqjanux ɣa, imaʔ mamuʔ ʦ~ʨjux kiʔan na ppaŋaʔ wakil na tawkan, ru imaʔ mamu la trakaʔ kklβuʔ na ħupaw ɣa, qiriʔ mus~ɕaʔ mtqtqutux maqut βliħun, kuna kja la ʦ~ʨjux mqajat s~ɕa tluqij na jaβaʔ ru jajaʔ, ʔnβlaq pwazjaw, laxi pinqiriʔ mqjanux! kuna ms~ɕriħaw la knatan luβaj βuβuʔ na jajaʔ ɣa, βaħa s~ɕimuw jan jɣril na qlʦ~ʨiŋ, laxij pqiwaj na pakaw, maħa jɣril s~ɕimu na qlʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, nanuʔ qu mus~ɕaʔ mamuʔ ps~ɕɣlaβaŋ s~ɕa rqjas~ɕ ħwinuk laqiʔ mamu lpij!* jani qu s~ɕɣis~ɕa na ββnkis~ɕ tajal ariŋ s~ɕraral. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ħitajpajan ****
